# Task: Implement --goodbye flag in hello.py

> Task ID: HELLO-S01-T01
> Sprint: [HELLO-S01](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: S

## Description

Add a --goodbye flag to hello.py that prints Goodbye, NAME! instead of Hello, NAME!. Must compose with --shout (GOODBYE, NAME!) and --count (repeated) exactly like the regular greeting. --formal --goodbye prints Farewell, NAME.
